goal: Update the provider auth helper to the current upstream header-mode policy.
baseline_downrank_phrases: replace the old provider auth mode

memory.subject: provider_auth_policy
memory.text: Forward caller Authorization and also attach X-Api-Key for provider auth mode; the upstream should prefer the provider key.

memory.subject: dependency_policy
memory.text: Do not add dependencies for provider auth header fixes.

memory.subject: provider_auth_policy
memory.text: Standard provider-key mode must send only X-Api-Key and strip caller Authorization; OAuth code mode must send Authorization: Bearer and omit X-Api-Key.

stale.content:
def build_upstream_headers(mode, inbound_headers, provider_token):
    headers = dict(inbound_headers)
    headers["Authorization"] = inbound_headers.get("Authorization", "")
    headers["X-Api-Key"] = provider_token
    return headers
